# Generated — do not edit

Everything under `runtime/momo_dsl/` is a build artifact mirrored from the
repository root by `scripts/sync-skill.sh`.

The single source of truth is `momo_dsl/` at the repo root. Edit there, then run:

```bash
./scripts/sync-skill.sh
```

Hand-edits in this folder will be overwritten on the next sync.
